accurate.why: The summary accurately states the bill's title and core purpose to reaffirm the Declaration of Independence as an Organic Law.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated or contradictory claims appear in the truncated summary.

states_purpose.why: The summary clearly identifies the bill's purpose to reaffirm and re-adopt the Declaration of Independence as an Organic Law.

changes_to_existing_law.why: The bill amends no statute; it reaffirms a foundational document, so this criterion does not apply.

exceptions_conditions.why: The bill contains no material exceptions, conditions, or eligibility limits.

effective_dates.why: The bill specifies no effective dates, sunsets, or deadlines.

major_provisions_covered.why: The summary is cut off mid-sentence and omits the provision setting forth the full text of the Declaration in commemoration of the 250th anniversary.

objective_tone.why: The summary is neutral and free of editorializing.

coherent.why: The summary ends abruptly mid-sentence ('The bill's primary'), making it incomplete and not fully coherent.

concise.why: The summary avoids padding and filler in the text provided.

correct_entities.why: The bill title, number (S. 4828), and the Declaration of Independence are all correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: The only figure stated (the year 2026 in the title) is correct.
